channel.title: FreshRaise - Weekly funded-startup signals
channel.description: Each week: freshly-funded startups, the role to contact, and a ready-to-send angle.

item.title: FreshRaise 2026-W26: 16 freshly-funded accounts to sell to this week
item.description:
FreshRaise Issue 2026-W26

Freshly-funded B2B SaaS & tech startups (pre-seed -> Series B)

16 trigger-ready accounts, scored and contextualized.

Almetra (formerly Deltia)

heat 91

Trigger: €16-16.3M Series A led by blisce/, with NAP, Merantix Capital, Robert Bosch — Tech.eu & EU-Startups, as of 25 Jun 2026

Why now: Corroborated by two sources; a Berlin manufacturing-intelligence startup raising a fresh Series A to fund product development and US expansion needs hands across growth, hiring and RevOps.

Who to contact: VP Marketing / Head of Growth

Angle: Reference their stated US go-to-market push and offer a US-market demand-gen playbook tailored to shopfloor/manufacturing buyers.

source

Compri

heat 86

Trigger: €3.2M seed led by Picus Capital — Tech.eu, as of 24 Jun 2026

Why now: Milan AI-procurement SaaS at seed stage with fresh capital — prime moment to land design, dev and outbound services before they build internal teams.

Who to contact: Co-founder / CEO

Angle: Open with how other seed-stage AI procurement tools shortened sales cycles to industrial buyers via targeted ABM, and offer a 30-day pilot.

source

Kalipso

heat 84

Trigger: $3.2M funding for regulatory-compliance (RegTech) platform — Tech.eu, as of 25 Jun 2026

Why now: Barcelona RegTech SaaS just funded and scaling; lawyer/engineer team will need growth, content and RevOps support to commercialise.

Who to contact: Co-founder / Head of Growth

Angle: Pitch a compliance-buyer content engine (whitepapers + demand gen) that speaks to risk/legal decision-makers, citing their lawyer-built positioning.

source

Serpier

heat 82

Trigger: €1.4M from True Collective and EIFO for AI marketing platform — Tech.eu, as of 25 Jun 2026

Why now: Danish martech raised to expand its AI e-commerce marketing platform; fresh-funded and small enough to need fractional CMO, design and dev help fast.

Who to contact: CEO / Head of Marketing

Angle: Note their EIFO backing and offer a partner/integration GTM motion to reach online retailers faster than building it in-house.

source

Fika Jobs

heat 80

Trigger: $4M for a video-first AI hiring platform — TechCrunch, as of 23 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) Single-source but a fresh $4M HR-tech SaaS raise — perfect window for recruiting, growth and product-design services as they scale the platform.

Who to contact: Co-founder / CEO

Angle: Reference their AI-agent interview angle and offer a launch-PR + demand-gen sprint to win recruiter customers.

source

SE3 Labs

heat 78

Trigger: Emerged from stealth backed by Lakestar, Seedcamp and EWOR; spatial AI platform — Tech.eu, as of 26 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) Just out of stealth with top-tier backers but no disclosed amount — early window to embed brand, web and developer-marketing support.

Who to contact: Co-founder / CEO

Angle: Congratulate on the stealth launch and offer a launch-narrative + positioning package for technical autonomous-systems buyers.

source

Wakeline

heat 76

Trigger: €2.1M pre-seed led by TechVision Fonds (TVF) — Tech.eu, as of 24 Jun 2026

Why now: Düsseldorf deeptech (continuously-adaptive AI) at pre-seed; small team newly funded and likely to outsource dev, design and early go-to-market.

Who to contact: Founder / CTO

Angle: Offer a lean MVP-to-market sprint for deeptech, referencing their adaptive-AI focus and need to show traction to investors.

source

Kyrok

heat 75

Trigger: €3.1M pre-seed — The SaaS News & FinSMEs, as of 23 Jun 2026

Why now: Corroborated across two outlets; a fresh pre-seed SaaS raise means budget and a near-empty back office — ideal for fractional CFO/CMO and growth services.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Open with how other pre-seed SaaS teams set up RevOps and reporting before their seed raise, offering a quick audit.

source

HR Duo

heat 74

Trigger: €1.6M led by Puma Growth Partners with Enterprise Ireland — EU-Startups, as of 25 Jun 2026

Why now: Irish HR-tech SaaS raising specifically to grow its UK sales team and harden SaaS infra — direct demand for recruiting, RevOps and dev services now.

Who to contact: Head of Sales / CEO

Angle: They said they're building a UK sales team — offer recruiting + sales-ops setup to hit the ground running in the UK market.

source

AethexAI

heat 72

Trigger: $3M pre-seed for full-stack voice AI infrastructure — afrotech.com, as of 22 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) Single-source pre-seed; voice-AI infra startup targeting emerging markets needs enterprise sales, dev and growth support to scale.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Reference their emerging-markets enterprise focus and offer a B2B sales-enablement + localization package.

source

Lumenai

heat 66

Trigger: Pre-seed round (amount undisclosed) — The SaaS News, as of 24 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) Newly pre-seed SaaS with no disclosed amount; early window to win brand, web and growth work before they staff up.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Congratulate on the pre-seed and offer a positioning + landing-page sprint to convert early interest into pipeline.

source

Sovra

heat 64

Trigger: $2M pre-seed for stablecoin-powered fintech — EnterpriseAM, as of 22 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) Single-source fintech pre-seed; fresh capital and tiny team mean early demand for dev, compliance-content and growth support.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Open with how early fintechs de-risk launch with compliance-ready content and a focused dev sprint, citing their stablecoin angle.

source

Ground

heat 63

Trigger: $3.6M pre-seed (Superstate co-founder) to help fintechs access onchain yield — The Block, as of 24 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) Fresh pre-seed B2B fintech infra; early team will need dev, design and B2B GTM to reach fintech customers.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Reference their fintech-developer audience and offer a docs+developer-marketing package to drive integration adoption.

source

Cambrian

heat 62

Trigger: $6M seed (a16z CSX-backed) to build a blockchain data oracle network — The Block, as of 24 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) Single-source seed but a16z CSX backing signals momentum; early-stage infra team needs developer-marketing and growth support.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Congratulate on a16z CSX backing and offer a developer-relations + technical-content program to grow oracle adoption.

source

Lytmus AI

heat 58

Trigger: ₹5 crore pre-seed led by Boundless Ventures — Business Standard, as of 28 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) Fresh AI pre-seed; small newly-funded team is an early target for dev, design and go-to-market services.

Who to contact: Founder / CEO

Angle: Open with a quick MVP-to-market plan for AI startups and reference their Boundless Ventures backing.

source

Point2 Technology

heat 52

Trigger: Form D filed with SEC — as of 26 Jun 2026

Why now: (unverified) New SEC Form D suggests a fresh raise at a US tech/semiconductor SaaS-adjacent startup; worth a fast, exploratory outreach before details surface.

Who to contact: CEO / VP Operations

Angle: Reference the new Form D filing and offer a discreet GTM or RevOps readiness check tied to the capital they just raised.

source

© FreshRaise. Signals sourced from public news; verify before outreach.
